arts.ttl: Derby County could be missing 10 players for Coventry City clash and return of Frank Lampard
arts.sum: The headline news is that Lars-Jorgen Salvesen is out for the season after undergoing knee surgery that has seen the Norwegian have some cartilage cleared out of his knee in what is an issue with his meniscus. Derby County have been gripped with a multitude of fresh injury worries that has seriously depleted John Eustace's options for their clash against Coventry City tomorrow night.
